commands: backend: python manage.py test execution.tests_auto_router execution.tests_auto_shadow_validate
expected_results: A real Wayond message fed through acquire_message with DEFAULT config stays MANUAL: INTAKEN approval PENDING_APPROVAL, 0 ExecutionJob, 0 SignalExecutionPlan.

The same message with a fully-armed TEST config auto-advances into PLACE_ORDER_SHADOW jobs ONLY: approval APPROVED, plan PROMOTED, every job job_type=PLACE_ORDER_SHADOW with payload execution_mode=SHADOW, 0 PLACE_ORDER/OPEN_TRADE/PLACE_TEST_ORDER jobs.
Missing stop-loss blocks (0 jobs); missing take-profit blocks (0 jobs); an edited signal blocks (0 jobs).
Runtime risk controls run on the auto path: with the open-positions cap forced to 0 an armed, valid signal yields 0 jobs; the control case (default caps) yields PLACE_ORDER_SHADOW jobs.
The auto_router source references no order_send/order_check/agent_order/PLACE_ORDER/OPEN_TRADE/PLACE_TEST_ORDER identifier; it reaches execution only via promote_plan_to_shadow_jobs.
provision_auto_shadow creates the guvfx-auto-system reviewer with review_signals, an unusable password (cannot log in), is_staff False; idempotent; --revoke removes the permission.
Full backend suite green; secret-scan + governance-check pass.
actual_results: AutoShadowE2ETests.test_fully_armed_creates_shadow_jobs_only_end_to_end: PASS (APPROVED, plan PROMOTED, all jobs PLACE_ORDER_SHADOW, payload execution_mode=SHADOW, 0 executable jobs).
BlockedCaseTests: missing SL / missing TP / edited each PASS (0 jobs).
RiskControlTests: cap-0 block PASS (0 jobs); within-caps control PASS (PLACE_ORDER_SHADOW created, 0 executable).
BoundaryAndCommandTests.test_no_order_send_in_router_code: PASS (AST: none of order_send/order_check/agent_order/PLACE_ORDER/OPEN_TRADE/PLACE_TEST_ORDER present; promote_plan_to_shadow_jobs present).
BoundaryAndCommandTests.test_provision_command_identity: PASS (review_signals granted, unusable password, not staff, idempotent, revoke removes perm).
auto_router + auto_shadow_validate targeted: Ran 30 tests OK.
Full backend suite: Ran 394 tests OK.
make secret-scan: OK (no findings); governance-check: OK; EVIDENCE-LINT PASS.
limitations: Repo/test only — no production deploy, no provider armed in production, no auto-demo, no auto-live, no E3, no order_send, no real trade, no Telegram notification, no close-monitor, no WIMS change.
The 'armed' config is created in-memory inside the test database only; provision_auto_shadow provisions ONLY the reviewer identity and never arms a provider or sets auto_execution_enabled.
Shadow-only is exercised through the reused promote_plan_to_shadow_jobs bridge; the deeper worker/bridge order_check dry-run path (E2b) is out of scope here and unchanged.
head_commit e486cac is the code+tests commit; this manifest is added in the following commit on the same branch and validated by the same PR CI.
